title: rosa × sabinii var. doniana
intro: Rosa × sabinii var. doniana, also known as Don's rose or Rosa Doniana, is a hybrid rose species that is a cross between Rosa sabinii and Rosa chinensis. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rosa × sabinii var. doniana include its ability to reduce stress, improve sleep quality, and alleviate symptoms of menopause, such as hot flashes and night sweats. Rosa × sabinii var. doniana is typically prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
